text: List the position of players with average number of points scored by players of that position bigger than 20.
structured: SELECT POSITION FROM player GROUP BY name HAVING avg(Points)  >=  20
sql: SELECT POSITION FROM player GROUP BY name HAVING avg(Points)  >=  20

text: Which apartments have type code "Flat"? Give me their apartment numbers.
structured: SELECT apt_number FROM Apartments WHERE apt_type_code  =  "Flat"
sql: SELECT apt_number FROM Apartments WHERE apt_type_code  =  "Flat"

text: find the names of programs whose origin is not in Beijing.
structured: SELECT name FROM program WHERE origin != 'Beijing'
sql: SELECT name FROM program WHERE origin != 'Beijing'

text: Give the title of the prerequisite to the course International Finance.
structured: SELECT title FROM course WHERE course_id IN (SELECT T1.prereq_id FROM prereq AS T1 JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.course_id  =  T2.course_id WHERE T2.title  =  'International Finance')
sql: SELECT title FROM course WHERE course_id IN (SELECT T1.prereq_id FROM prereq AS T1 JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.course_id  =  T2.course_id WHERE T2.title  =  'International Finance')

text: Find the delegates who are from counties with population below 100000.
structured: SELECT T2.Delegate FROM county AS T1 JOIN election AS T2 ON T1.County_id  =  T2.District WHERE T1.Population  <  100000
sql: SELECT T2.Delegate FROM county AS T1 JOIN election AS T2 ON T1.County_id  =  T2.District WHERE T1.Population  <  100000

text: Show the name of track and the number of races in each track.
structured: SELECT T2.name ,  count(*) FROM race AS T1 JOIN track AS T2 ON T1.track_id  =  T2.track_id GROUP BY T1.track_id
sql: SELECT T2.name ,  count(*) FROM race AS T1 JOIN track AS T2 ON T1.track_id  =  T2.track_id GROUP BY T1.track_id

text: What are the names of teams from universities that have a below average enrollment?
structured: SELECT t2.team_name FROM university AS t1 JOIN basketball_match AS t2 ON t1.school_id  =  t2.school_id WHERE enrollment  <  (SELECT avg(enrollment) FROM university)
sql: SELECT t2.team_name FROM university AS t1 JOIN basketball_match AS t2 ON t1.school_id  =  t2.school_id WHERE enrollment  <  (SELECT avg(enrollment) FROM university)

text: Give the number of students living in either HKG or CHI.
structured: SELECT count(*) FROM Student WHERE city_code  =  "HKG" OR city_code  =  "CHI"
sql: SELECT count(*) FROM Student WHERE city_code  =  "HKG" OR city_code  =  "CHI"

text: How many different songs have shared vocals?
structured: SELECT count(DISTINCT title) FROM vocals AS T1 JOIN songs AS T2 ON T1.songid  =  T2.songid WHERE TYPE  =  "shared"
sql: SELECT count(DISTINCT title) FROM vocals AS T1 JOIN songs AS T2 ON T1.songid  =  T2.songid WHERE TYPE  =  "shared"

text: Return the the details of all products.
structured: SELECT DISTINCT product_details FROM products
sql: SELECT DISTINCT product_details FROM products

text: List the most common type of artworks.
structured: SELECT TYPE FROM artwork GROUP BY TYPE ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
sql: SELECT TYPE FROM artwork GROUP BY TYPE ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

text: What is the name of the customer who has the largest number of orders?
structured: SELECT T1.customer_name FROM customers AS T1 JOIN orders AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id GROUP BY T1.customer_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1
sql: SELECT T1.customer_name FROM customers AS T1 JOIN orders AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id GROUP BY T1.customer_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

text: Find the first names of the faculty members who participate in Canoeing and Kayaking.
structured: SELECT T1.lname FROM Faculty AS T1 JOIN Faculty_participates_in AS T2 ON T1.facID  =  T2.facID JOIN activity AS T3 ON T2.actid  =  T2.actid WHERE T3.activity_name  =  'Canoeing' INTERSECT SELECT T1.lname FROM Faculty AS T1 JOIN Faculty_participates_in AS T2 ON T1.facID  =  T2.facID JOIN activity AS T3 ON T2.actid  =  T2.actid WHERE T3.activity_name  =  'Kayaking'
sql: SELECT T1.lname FROM Faculty AS T1 JOIN Faculty_participates_in AS T2 ON T1.facID  =  T2.facID JOIN activity AS T3 ON T2.actid  =  T2.actid WHERE T3.activity_name  =  'Canoeing' INTERSECT SELECT T1.lname FROM Faculty AS T1 JOIN Faculty_participates_in AS T2 ON T1.facID  =  T2.facID JOIN activity AS T3 ON T2.actid  =  T2.actid WHERE T3.activity_name  =  'Kayaking'

text: Return the most common first name among all actors.
structured: SELECT first_name FROM actor GROUP BY first_name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1
sql: SELECT first_name FROM actor GROUP BY first_name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

text: What is the party that has the largest number of representatives?
structured: SELECT Party ,  COUNT(*) FROM representative GROUP BY Party ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
sql: SELECT Party ,  COUNT(*) FROM representative GROUP BY Party ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

text: What are the average rating and resolution of songs that are in Bangla?
structured: SELECT avg(rating) ,  avg(resolution) FROM song WHERE languages  =  "bangla"
sql: SELECT avg(rating) ,  avg(resolution) FROM song WHERE languages  =  "bangla"

text: List the names of all distinct products in alphabetical order.
structured: SELECT DISTINCT product_name FROM products ORDER BY product_name
sql: SELECT DISTINCT product_name FROM products ORDER BY product_name

text: How many female students have milk or egg allergies?
structured: SELECT count(*) FROM has_allergy AS T1 JOIN Student AS T2 ON T1.StuID  =  T2.StuID WHERE T2.sex  =  "F" AND T1.allergy  =  "Milk" OR T1.allergy  =  "Eggs"
sql: SELECT count(*) FROM has_allergy AS T1 JOIN Student AS T2 ON T1.StuID  =  T2.StuID WHERE T2.sex  =  "F" AND T1.allergy  =  "Milk" OR T1.allergy  =  "Eggs"

text: Show the average, minimum, and maximum ticket prices for exhibitions for all years before 2009.
structured: SELECT avg(ticket_price) ,  min(ticket_price) ,  max(ticket_price) FROM exhibition WHERE YEAR  <  2009
sql: SELECT avg(ticket_price) ,  min(ticket_price) ,  max(ticket_price) FROM exhibition WHERE YEAR  <  2009

text: What are the names and ids of artists with 3 or more albums, listed in alphabetical order?
structured: SELECT T2.Name ,  T1.ArtistId FROM ALBUM AS T1 JOIN ARTIST AS T2 ON T1.ArtistId  =  T2.ArtistID GROUP BY T1.ArtistId HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  3 ORDER BY T2.Name
sql: SELECT T2.Name ,  T1.ArtistId FROM ALBUM AS T1 JOIN ARTIST AS T2 ON T1.ArtistId  =  T2.ArtistID GROUP BY T1.ArtistId HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  3 ORDER BY T2.Name

text: What is the average rating for each movie that has never been reviewed by Brittany Harris?
structured: SELECT mID ,  avg(stars) FROM Rating WHERE mID NOT IN (SELECT T1.mID FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Reviewer AS T2 ON T1.rID  =  T2.rID WHERE T2.name  =  "Brittany Harris") GROUP BY mID
sql: SELECT mID ,  avg(stars) FROM Rating WHERE mID NOT IN (SELECT T1.mID FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Reviewer AS T2 ON T1.rID  =  T2.rID WHERE T2.name  =  "Brittany Harris") GROUP BY mID

text: What is the full name of each student who is not allergic to any type of food.
structured: SELECT fname ,  lname FROM Student WHERE StuID NOT IN (SELECT T1.StuID FROM Has_allergy AS T1 JOIN Allergy_Type AS T2 ON T1.Allergy  =  T2.Allergy WHERE T2.allergytype  =  "food")
sql: SELECT fname ,  lname FROM Student WHERE StuID NOT IN (SELECT T1.StuID FROM Has_allergy AS T1 JOIN Allergy_Type AS T2 ON T1.Allergy  =  T2.Allergy WHERE T2.allergytype  =  "food")

text: Show the date of the tallest perpetrator.
structured: SELECT T2.Date FROM people AS T1 JOIN perpetrator AS T2 ON T1.People_ID  =  T2.People_ID ORDER BY T1.Height DESC LIMIT 1
sql: SELECT T2.Date FROM people AS T1 JOIN perpetrator AS T2 ON T1.People_ID  =  T2.People_ID ORDER BY T1.Height DESC LIMIT 1

text: Show the location code of the country "Canada".
structured: SELECT location_code FROM Ref_locations WHERE location_name  =  "Canada"
sql: SELECT location_code FROM Ref_locations WHERE location_name  =  "Canada"

text: Find names of all colleges whose enrollment is greater than that of all colleges in the FL state.
structured: SELECT cName FROM college WHERE enr  >  (SELECT max(enr) FROM college WHERE state  =  'FL')
sql: SELECT cName FROM college WHERE enr  >  (SELECT max(enr) FROM college WHERE state  =  'FL')

text: Return ids of all the products that are supplied by supplier id 2 and are more expensive than the average price of all products.
structured: SELECT T1.product_id FROM product_suppliers AS T1 JOIN products AS T2 ON T1.product_id  =  T2.product_id WHERE T1.supplier_id  =  2 AND T2.product_price  >  (SELECT avg(product_price) FROM products)
sql: SELECT T1.product_id FROM product_suppliers AS T1 JOIN products AS T2 ON T1.product_id  =  T2.product_id WHERE T1.supplier_id  =  2 AND T2.product_price  >  (SELECT avg(product_price) FROM products)

text: Find the distinct last names of all the students who have president votes and whose advisor is 8741.
structured: SELECT DISTINCT T1.LName FROM STUDENT AS T1 JOIN VOTING_RECORD AS T2 ON T1.StuID  =  PRESIDENT_Vote INTERSECT SELECT DISTINCT LName FROM STUDENT WHERE Advisor  =  "8741"
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.LName FROM STUDENT AS T1 JOIN VOTING_RECORD AS T2 ON T1.StuID  =  PRESIDENT_Vote INTERSECT SELECT DISTINCT LName FROM STUDENT WHERE Advisor  =  "8741"

text: What is the average rating of songs for each language?
structured: SELECT avg(rating) ,  languages FROM song GROUP BY languages
sql: SELECT avg(rating) ,  languages FROM song GROUP BY languages

text: List each donator name and the amount of endowment in descending order of the amount of endowment.
structured: SELECT donator_name ,  sum(amount) FROM endowment GROUP BY donator_name ORDER BY sum(amount) DESC
sql: SELECT donator_name ,  sum(amount) FROM endowment GROUP BY donator_name ORDER BY sum(amount) DESC

text: Show the company name and the main industry for all companies whose headquarters are not from USA.
structured: SELECT company ,  main_industry FROM company WHERE headquarters != 'USA'
sql: SELECT company ,  main_industry FROM company WHERE headquarters != 'USA'

text: What are the name of rooms booked by customers whose first name has "ROY" in part?
structured: SELECT T2.roomName FROM Reservations AS T1 JOIN Rooms AS T2 ON T1.Room  =  T2.RoomId WHERE firstname LIKE '%ROY%'
sql: SELECT T2.roomName FROM Reservations AS T1 JOIN Rooms AS T2 ON T1.Room  =  T2.RoomId WHERE firstname LIKE '%ROY%'

text: Show the id and name of the aircraft with the maximum distance.
structured: SELECT aid ,  name FROM Aircraft ORDER BY distance DESC LIMIT 1
sql: SELECT aid ,  name FROM Aircraft ORDER BY distance DESC LIMIT 1

text: What are the origins of all flights that are headed to Honolulu?
structured: SELECT origin FROM Flight WHERE destination  =  "Honolulu"
sql: SELECT origin FROM Flight WHERE destination  =  "Honolulu"

text: Find the code of city where most of students are living in.
structured: SELECT city_code FROM student GROUP BY city_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1
sql: SELECT city_code FROM student GROUP BY city_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

text: What is all the information about employees who have never had a job in the past?
structured: SELECT * FROM employees WHERE employee_id NOT IN (SELECT employee_id FROM job_history)
sql: SELECT * FROM employees WHERE employee_id NOT IN (SELECT employee_id FROM job_history)

text: Which physicians are affiliated with both Surgery and Psychiatry departments? Tell me their names.
structured: SELECT T1.name FROM physician AS T1 JOIN affiliated_with AS T2 ON T1.EmployeeID  =  T2.physician JOIN department AS T3 ON T2.department  =  T3.DepartmentID WHERE T3.name  =  'Surgery' INTERSECT SELECT T1.name FROM physician AS T1 JOIN affiliated_with AS T2 ON T1.EmployeeID  =  T2.physician JOIN department AS T3 ON T2.department  =  T3.DepartmentID WHERE T3.name  =  'Psychiatry'
sql: SELECT T1.name FROM physician AS T1 JOIN affiliated_with AS T2 ON T1.EmployeeID  =  T2.physician JOIN department AS T3 ON T2.department  =  T3.DepartmentID WHERE T3.name  =  'Surgery' INTERSECT SELECT T1.name FROM physician AS T1 JOIN affiliated_with AS T2 ON T1.EmployeeID  =  T2.physician JOIN department AS T3 ON T2.department  =  T3.DepartmentID WHERE T3.name  =  'Psychiatry'

text: Count the number of different official languages corresponding to countries that players who play Defender are from.
structured: SELECT count(DISTINCT T1.Official_native_language) FROM country AS T1 JOIN match_season AS T2 ON T1.Country_id  =  T2.Country WHERE T2.Position  =  "Defender"
sql: SELECT count(DISTINCT T1.Official_native_language) FROM country AS T1 JOIN match_season AS T2 ON T1.Country_id  =  T2.Country WHERE T2.Position  =  "Defender"

text: How many camera lenses are not used in taking any photos?
structured: SELECT count(*) FROM camera_lens WHERE id NOT IN ( SELECT camera_lens_id FROM photos )
sql: SELECT count(*) FROM camera_lens WHERE id NOT IN ( SELECT camera_lens_id FROM photos )

text: Find the name and age of the person who is a friend of Dan or Alice.
structured: SELECT DISTINCT T1.name ,  T1.age FROM Person AS T1 JOIN PersonFriend AS T2 ON T1.name  =  T2.name WHERE T2.friend  =  'Dan' OR T2.friend  =  'Alice'
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.name ,  T1.age FROM Person AS T1 JOIN PersonFriend AS T2 ON T1.name  =  T2.name WHERE T2.friend  =  'Dan' OR T2.friend  =  'Alice'

text: What are the id of students who registered course 301?
structured: SELECT student_id FROM student_course_attendance WHERE course_id  =  301
sql: SELECT student_id FROM student_course_attendance WHERE course_id  =  301

text: Count the number of distinct instructors who have taught a course.
structured: SELECT COUNT (DISTINCT id) FROM teaches
sql: SELECT COUNT (DISTINCT id) FROM teaches

text: Show the parties that have both representatives in New York state and representatives in Pennsylvania state.
structured: SELECT Party FROM representative WHERE State  =  "New York" INTERSECT SELECT Party FROM representative WHERE State  =  "Pennsylvania"
sql: SELECT Party FROM representative WHERE State  =  "New York" INTERSECT SELECT Party FROM representative WHERE State  =  "Pennsylvania"

text: Show all artist name, age, and country ordered by the yeared they joined.
structured: SELECT name ,  age ,  country FROM artist ORDER BY Year_Join
sql: SELECT name ,  age ,  country FROM artist ORDER BY Year_Join

text: Who are the members of the club named "Bootup Baltimore"? Give me their last names.
structured: SELECT t3.lname FROM club AS t1 JOIN member_of_club AS t2 ON t1.clubid  =  t2.clubid JOIN student AS t3 ON t2.stuid  =  t3.stuid WHERE t1.clubname  =  "Bootup Baltimore"
sql: SELECT t3.lname FROM club AS t1 JOIN member_of_club AS t2 ON t1.clubid  =  t2.clubid JOIN student AS t3 ON t2.stuid  =  t3.stuid WHERE t1.clubname  =  "Bootup Baltimore"

text: Show the average price of hotels for each star rating code.
structured: SELECT star_rating_code ,  avg(price_range) FROM HOTELS GROUP BY star_rating_code
sql: SELECT star_rating_code ,  avg(price_range) FROM HOTELS GROUP BY star_rating_code

text: Return the description of the product called "Chocolate".
structured: SELECT product_description FROM products WHERE product_name  =  "Chocolate"
sql: SELECT product_description FROM products WHERE product_name  =  "Chocolate"

text: List the names of counties that do not have any cities.
structured: SELECT Name FROM county_public_safety WHERE County_ID NOT IN (SELECT County_ID FROM city)
sql: SELECT Name FROM county_public_safety WHERE County_ID NOT IN (SELECT County_ID FROM city)

text: Find the SSN and name of scientists who are assigned to the project with the longest hours.
structured: SELECT T3.ssn ,  T3.name FROM assignedto AS T1 JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.project  =  T2.code JOIN scientists AS T3 ON T1.scientist  =  T3.SSN WHERE T2.hours  =  (SELECT max(hours) FROM projects)
sql: SELECT T3.ssn ,  T3.name FROM assignedto AS T1 JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.project  =  T2.code JOIN scientists AS T3 ON T1.scientist  =  T3.SSN WHERE T2.hours  =  (SELECT max(hours) FROM projects)

text: Find the name and account balance of the customer whose name includes the letter ‘a’.
structured: SELECT cust_name ,  acc_bal FROM customer WHERE cust_name LIKE '%a%'
sql: SELECT cust_name ,  acc_bal FROM customer WHERE cust_name LIKE '%a%'

text: Please list support, consider, and oppose rates for each candidate in ascending order by unsure rate.
structured: SELECT Support_rate ,  Consider_rate ,  Oppose_rate FROM candidate ORDER BY unsure_rate
sql: SELECT Support_rate ,  Consider_rate ,  Oppose_rate FROM candidate ORDER BY unsure_rate

text: What is the most common type of ships?
structured: SELECT TYPE FROM ship GROUP BY TYPE ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
sql: SELECT TYPE FROM ship GROUP BY TYPE ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

text: what is the GDP of the city with the largest population.
structured: SELECT gdp FROM city ORDER BY Regional_Population DESC LIMIT 1
sql: SELECT gdp FROM city ORDER BY Regional_Population DESC LIMIT 1

text: Return the number of kids for the room reserved and checked in by DAMIEN TRACHSEL on  Sep 21, 2010.
structured: SELECT Kids FROM Reservations WHERE CheckIn  =  "2010-09-21" AND FirstName  =  "DAMIEN" AND LastName  =  "TRACHSEL";
sql: SELECT Kids FROM Reservations WHERE CheckIn  =  "2010-09-21" AND FirstName  =  "DAMIEN" AND LastName  =  "TRACHSEL";

text: Find the last name of the first ever contact person of the organization with the highest UK Vat number.
structured: SELECT t3.individual_last_name FROM organizations AS t1 JOIN organization_contact_individuals AS t2 ON t1.organization_id  =  t2.organization_id JOIN individuals AS t3 ON t2.individual_id  =  t3.individual_id WHERE t1.uk_vat_number  =  (SELECT max(uk_vat_number) FROM organizations) ORDER BY t2.date_contact_to ASC LIMIT 1
sql: SELECT t3.individual_last_name FROM organizations AS t1 JOIN organization_contact_individuals AS t2 ON t1.organization_id  =  t2.organization_id JOIN individuals AS t3 ON t2.individual_id  =  t3.individual_id WHERE t1.uk_vat_number  =  (SELECT max(uk_vat_number) FROM organizations) ORDER BY t2.date_contact_to ASC LIMIT 1

text: Find the emails of parties with the most popular party form.
structured: SELECT t1.party_email FROM parties AS t1 JOIN party_forms AS t2 ON t1.party_id  =  t2.party_id WHERE t2.form_id  =  (SELECT form_id FROM party_forms GROUP BY form_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1)
sql: SELECT t1.party_email FROM parties AS t1 JOIN party_forms AS t2 ON t1.party_id  =  t2.party_id WHERE t2.form_id  =  (SELECT form_id FROM party_forms GROUP BY form_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1)

text: What is the name of the instructor who advises the student with the greatest number of total credits?
structured: SELECT T2.name FROM advisor AS T1 JOIN instructor AS T2 ON T1.i_id  =  T2.id JOIN student AS T3 ON T1.s_id  =  T3.id ORDER BY T3.tot_cred DESC LIMIT 1
sql: SELECT T2.name FROM advisor AS T1 JOIN instructor AS T2 ON T1.i_id  =  T2.id JOIN student AS T3 ON T1.s_id  =  T3.id ORDER BY T3.tot_cred DESC LIMIT 1

text: Find the id and address of the shops whose score is below the average score.
structured: SELECT shop_id ,  address FROM shop WHERE score  <  (SELECT avg(score) FROM shop)
sql: SELECT shop_id ,  address FROM shop WHERE score  <  (SELECT avg(score) FROM shop)

text: Compute the total amount of settlement across all the settlements.
structured: SELECT sum(Amount_Settled) FROM Settlements
sql: SELECT sum(Amount_Settled) FROM Settlements

text: What are the manager's first name, last name and id who won the most manager award?
structured: SELECT T1.name_first ,  T1.name_last ,  T2.player_id FROM player AS T1 JOIN manager_award AS T2 ON T1.player_id  =  T2.player_id GROUP BY T2.player_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
sql: SELECT T1.name_first ,  T1.name_last ,  T2.player_id FROM player AS T1 JOIN manager_award AS T2 ON T1.player_id  =  T2.player_id GROUP BY T2.player_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

text: What are the countries for each market, ordered alphabetically?
structured: SELECT Country FROM market ORDER BY Country ASC
sql: SELECT Country FROM market ORDER BY Country ASC

text: Show names of actors that have appeared in musical with name "The Phantom of the Opera".
structured: SELECT T1.Name FROM actor AS T1 JOIN musical AS T2 ON T1.Musical_ID  =  T2.Musical_ID WHERE T2.Name  =  "The Phantom of the Opera"
sql: SELECT T1.Name FROM actor AS T1 JOIN musical AS T2 ON T1.Musical_ID  =  T2.Musical_ID WHERE T2.Name  =  "The Phantom of the Opera"

text: What are the maximum and average height of the mountains?
structured: SELECT max(height) ,  avg(height) FROM mountain

text: What are the names of the drama workshop groups with address in Feliciaberg city?

sql: SELECT T2.Store_Name FROM Addresses AS T1 JOIN Drama_Workshop_Groups AS T2 ON T1.Address_ID  =  T2.Address_ID WHERE T1.City_Town  =  "Feliciaberg"

structured: SELECT count(*) FROM instruments WHERE instrument  =  "drums"
sql: SELECT count(*) FROM instruments WHERE instrument  =  "drums"

structured: SELECT count(*) FROM Rooms WHERE bedType  =  "King";
sql: SELECT count(*) FROM Rooms WHERE bedType  =  "King";

text: Give the color description for the product 'catnip'.
structured: SELECT t2.color_description FROM products AS t1 JOIN ref_colors AS t2 ON t1.color_code  =  t2.color_code WHERE t1.product_name  =  "catnip"
sql: SELECT t2.color_description FROM products AS t1 JOIN ref_colors AS t2 ON t1.color_code  =  t2.color_code WHERE t1.product_name  =  "catnip"

text: Show the maximum and minimum share count of different transaction types.

sql: SELECT transaction_type_code ,  max(share_count) ,  min(share_count) FROM TRANSACTIONS GROUP BY transaction_type_code

text: Give me a list of cities whose temperature in Mar is lower than that in July and which have also served as host cities?
structured: SELECT T1.city FROM city AS T1 JOIN temperature AS T2 ON T1.city_id  =  T2.city_id WHERE T2.Mar  <  T2.Jul INTERSECT SELECT T3.city FROM city AS T3 JOIN hosting_city AS T4 ON T3.city_id  =  T4.host_city
sql: SELECT T1.city FROM city AS T1 JOIN temperature AS T2 ON T1.city_id  =  T2.city_id WHERE T2.Mar  <  T2.Jul INTERSECT SELECT T3.city FROM city AS T3 JOIN hosting_city AS T4 ON T3.city_id  =  T4.host_city

text: Find the login name of the course author that teaches the course with name "advanced database".

sql: SELECT T1.name FROM airlines AS T1 JOIN routes AS T2 ON T1.alid  =  T2.alid GROUP BY T1.name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

text: What are the distinct customers who have orders with status "On Road"? Give me the customer details?

text: What is the id and trade name of the medicines can interact with at least 3 enzymes?

sql: SELECT T1.Title FROM Album AS T1 JOIN Track AS T2 ON T1.AlbumId  =  T2.AlbumId JOIN Genre AS T3 ON T2.GenreID  =  T3.GenreID WHERE T3.Name  =  'Reggae' INTERSECT SELECT T1.Title FROM Album AS T1 JOIN Track AS T2 ON T1.AlbumId  =  T2.AlbumId JOIN Genre AS T3 ON T2.GenreID  =  T3.GenreID WHERE T3.Name  =  'Rock'

sql: SELECT T3.Name ,  T2.Name FROM employment AS T1 JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.People_ID  =  T2.People_ID JOIN company AS T3 ON T1.Company_ID  =  T3.Company_ID ORDER BY T1.Year_working

sql: SELECT t2.product_details FROM order_items AS t1 JOIN products AS t2 ON t1.product_id  =  t2.product_id GROUP BY t1.product_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

sql: SELECT T2.theme FROM exhibition_record AS T1 JOIN exhibition AS T2 ON T1.exhibition_id  =  T2.exhibition_id WHERE T1.attendance  <  100 INTERSECT SELECT T2.theme FROM exhibition_record AS T1 JOIN exhibition AS T2 ON T1.exhibition_id  =  T2.exhibition_id WHERE T1.attendance  >  500

structured: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Major FROM STUDENT AS T1 JOIN VOTING_RECORD AS T2 ON T1.StuID  =  T2.Treasurer_Vote
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Major FROM STUDENT AS T1 JOIN VOTING_RECORD AS T2 ON T1.StuID  =  T2.Treasurer_Vote

text: What are the names of products that are not 'white' in color and are not measured by the unit 'Handful'?
structured: SELECT t1.product_name FROM products AS t1 JOIN ref_product_categories AS t2 ON t1.product_category_code  =  t2.product_category_code JOIN ref_colors AS t3 ON t1.color_code  =  t3.color_code WHERE t3.color_description  =  "white" AND t2.unit_of_measure != "Handful"
sql: SELECT t1.product_name FROM products AS t1 JOIN ref_product_categories AS t2 ON t1.product_category_code  =  t2.product_category_code JOIN ref_colors AS t3 ON t1.color_code  =  t3.color_code WHERE t3.color_description  =  "white" AND t2.unit_of_measure != "Handful"

text: Find the match ids of the cities that hosted competition "1994 FIFA World Cup qualification"?
structured: SELECT match_id FROM MATCH WHERE competition = "1994 FIFA World Cup qualification"
sql: SELECT match_id FROM MATCH WHERE competition = "1994 FIFA World Cup qualification"

text: Return the maximum and minimum customer codes.
structured: SELECT max(customer_code) ,  min(customer_code) FROM Customers
sql: SELECT max(customer_code) ,  min(customer_code) FROM Customers

text: Find all the payment dates for the payments with an amount larger than 10 and the payments handled by a staff person with the first name Elsa.
structured: SELECT payment_date FROM payment WHERE amount  >  10 UNION SELECT T1.payment_date FROM payment AS T1 JOIN staff AS T2 ON T1.staff_id  =  T2.staff_id WHERE T2.first_name  =  'Elsa'
sql: SELECT payment_date FROM payment WHERE amount  >  10 UNION SELECT T1.payment_date FROM payment AS T1 JOIN staff AS T2 ON T1.staff_id  =  T2.staff_id WHERE T2.first_name  =  'Elsa'

text: What are the titles of papers published by "Jeremy Gibbons"?
structured: SELECT t3.title FROM authors AS t1 JOIN authorship AS t2 ON t1.authid  =  t2.authid JOIN papers AS t3 ON t2.paperid  =  t3.paperid WHERE  t1.fname  =  "Jeremy" AND t1.lname  =  "Gibbons"
sql: SELECT t3.title FROM authors AS t1 JOIN authorship AS t2 ON t1.authid  =  t2.authid JOIN papers AS t3 ON t2.paperid  =  t3.paperid WHERE  t1.fname  =  "Jeremy" AND t1.lname  =  "Gibbons"

text: Show locations and nicknames of schools.
structured: SELECT T1.Location ,  T2.Nickname FROM school AS T1 JOIN school_details AS T2 ON T1.School_ID  =  T2.School_ID
sql: SELECT T1.Location ,  T2.Nickname FROM school AS T1 JOIN school_details AS T2 ON T1.School_ID  =  T2.School_ID

text: Please list the age and famous title of artists in descending order of age.
structured: SELECT Famous_Title ,  Age FROM artist ORDER BY Age DESC
sql: SELECT Famous_Title ,  Age FROM artist ORDER BY Age DESC

text: What is the name of the movie produced after 2000 and directed by James Cameron?
structured: SELECT title FROM Movie WHERE director = 'James Cameron' AND YEAR  >  2000
sql: SELECT title FROM Movie WHERE director = 'James Cameron' AND YEAR  >  2000

text: What is the name of the customer that made the order with the largest quantity?
structured: SELECT t1.customer_name FROM customers AS t1 JOIN customer_orders AS t2 ON t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id JOIN order_items AS t3 ON t2.order_id  =  t3.order_id WHERE t3.order_quantity  =  ( SELECT max(order_quantity) FROM order_items)
sql: SELECT t1.customer_name FROM customers AS t1 JOIN customer_orders AS t2 ON t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id JOIN order_items AS t3 ON t2.order_id  =  t3.order_id WHERE t3.order_quantity  =  ( SELECT max(order_quantity) FROM order_items)

text: List the name of actors in ascending alphabetical order.
structured: SELECT Name FROM actor ORDER BY Name ASC
sql: SELECT Name FROM actor ORDER BY Name ASC

text: Show all role codes and the number of employees in each role.
structured: SELECT role_code ,  count(*) FROM Employees GROUP BY role_code
sql: SELECT role_code ,  count(*) FROM Employees GROUP BY role_code

text: What are the names of the members and branches at which they are registered sorted by year of registration?
structured: SELECT T3.name ,  T2.name FROM membership_register_branch AS T1 JOIN branch AS T2 ON T1.branch_id  =  T2.branch_id JOIN member AS T3 ON T1.member_id  =  T3.member_id ORDER BY T1.register_year
sql: SELECT T3.name ,  T2.name FROM membership_register_branch AS T1 JOIN branch AS T2 ON T1.branch_id  =  T2.branch_id JOIN member AS T3 ON T1.member_id  =  T3.member_id ORDER BY T1.register_year

text: Find the names of reviewers who had given higher than 3 star ratings.
structured: SELECT T2.name FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Reviewer AS T2 ON T1.rID  =  T2.rID WHERE T1.stars  >  3
sql: SELECT T2.name FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Reviewer AS T2 ON T1.rID  =  T2.rID WHERE T1.stars  >  3

text: How many markets have number of cities smaller than 300?
structured: SELECT count(*) FROM market WHERE Number_cities  <  300
sql: SELECT count(*) FROM market WHERE Number_cities  <  300

text: Count the number of candidates.
structured: SELECT count(*) FROM candidate
sql: SELECT count(*) FROM candidate

text: What is the name of the technician whose team is not 'NYY'?
structured: SELECT Name FROM technician WHERE Team != "NYY"
sql: SELECT Name FROM technician WHERE Team != "NYY"

text: Find the names of all the products whose stock number starts with "2".
structured: SELECT catalog_entry_name FROM catalog_contents WHERE product_stock_number LIKE "2%"
sql: SELECT catalog_entry_name FROM catalog_contents WHERE product_stock_number LIKE "2%"

text: How many different statuses do cities have?
structured: SELECT count(DISTINCT Status) FROM city
sql: SELECT count(DISTINCT Status) FROM city

text: What are the names of hosts who did not host any party in our record?
structured: SELECT Name FROM HOST WHERE Host_ID NOT IN (SELECT Host_ID FROM party_host)
sql: SELECT Name FROM HOST WHERE Host_ID NOT IN (SELECT Host_ID FROM party_host)

text: What are the first names of the different drivers who won in position 1 as driver standing and had more than 20 points?
structured: SELECT DISTINCT T1.forename FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN driverstandings AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid WHERE T2.position = 1 AND T2.wins = 1 AND T2.points > 20
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.forename FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN driverstandings AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid WHERE T2.position = 1 AND T2.wins = 1 AND T2.points > 20

text: What are the booking start and end dates of the apartments with type code "Duplex"?
structured: SELECT T1.booking_start_date ,  T1.booking_start_date FROM Apartment_Bookings AS T1 JOIN Apartments AS T2 ON T1.apt_id  =  T2.apt_id WHERE T2.apt_type_code  =  "Duplex"
sql: SELECT T1.booking_start_date ,  T1.booking_start_date FROM Apartment_Bookings AS T1 JOIN Apartments AS T2 ON T1.apt_id  =  T2.apt_id WHERE T2.apt_type_code  =  "Duplex"

text: List the camera lens names containing substring "Digital".
structured: SELECT name FROM camera_lens WHERE name LIKE "%Digital%"
sql: SELECT name FROM camera_lens WHERE name LIKE "%Digital%"

text: Find the names of customers who have no policies associated.
structured: SELECT customer_details FROM customers EXCEPT SELECT t2.customer_details FROM policies AS t1 JOIN customers AS t2 ON t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id
sql: SELECT customer_details FROM customers EXCEPT SELECT t2.customer_details FROM policies AS t1 JOIN customers AS t2 ON t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id

text: List all female students age is older than 18 who is not majoring in 600. List students' first name and last name.
structured: SELECT Fname , Lname FROM Student WHERE Age  >  18 AND Major != 600 AND Sex = 'F';
sql: SELECT Fname , Lname FROM Student WHERE Age  >  18 AND Major != 600 AND Sex = 'F';

text: Which authors did not submit to any workshop?
structured: SELECT Author FROM submission WHERE Submission_ID NOT IN (SELECT Submission_ID FROM acceptance)
sql: SELECT Author FROM submission WHERE Submission_ID NOT IN (SELECT Submission_ID FROM acceptance)

text: How many customers don't have an account?
structured: SELECT count(*) FROM Customers WHERE customer_id NOT IN (SELECT customer_id FROM Accounts)
sql: SELECT count(*) FROM Customers WHERE customer_id NOT IN (SELECT customer_id FROM Accounts)

text: What are the first and last names of all the employees and how many people report to them?
structured: SELECT T2.first_name , T2.last_name ,  count(T1.reports_to) FROM employees AS T1 JOIN employees AS T2 ON T1.reports_to = T2.id GROUP BY T1.reports_to ORDER BY count(T1.reports_to) DESC LIMIT 1;
sql: SELECT T2.first_name , T2.last_name ,  count(T1.reports_to) FROM employees AS T1 JOIN employees AS T2 ON T1.reports_to = T2.id GROUP BY T1.reports_to ORDER BY count(T1.reports_to) DESC LIMIT 1;

text: Show the names of journalists that have reported more than one event.
structured: SELECT T3.Name FROM news_report AS T1 JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.Event_ID  =  T2.Event_ID JOIN journalist AS T3 ON T1.journalist_ID  =  T3.journalist_ID GROUP BY T3.Name HAVING COUNT(*)  >  1
sql: SELECT T3.Name FROM news_report AS T1 JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.Event_ID  =  T2.Event_ID JOIN journalist AS T3 ON T1.journalist_ID  =  T3.journalist_ID GROUP BY T3.Name HAVING COUNT(*)  >  1

text: What is the location of the party with the most hosts?
structured: SELECT LOCATION FROM party ORDER BY Number_of_hosts DESC LIMIT 1
sql: SELECT LOCATION FROM party ORDER BY Number_of_hosts DESC LIMIT 1

text: Show all different home cities.
structured: SELECT DISTINCT home_city FROM driver
sql: SELECT DISTINCT home_city FROM driver

text: What are the names of enzymes in descending order?
structured: SELECT name FROM enzyme ORDER BY name DESC
sql: SELECT name FROM enzyme ORDER BY name DESC

text: Show the names of companies in the banking or retailing industry?
structured: SELECT Name FROM company WHERE Industry  =  "Banking" OR Industry  =  "Retailing"
sql: SELECT Name FROM company WHERE Industry  =  "Banking" OR Industry  =  "Retailing"

text: Show the institution type with the largest number of institutions.
structured: SELECT TYPE FROM institution GROUP BY TYPE ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1
sql: SELECT TYPE FROM institution GROUP BY TYPE ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

text: Which address has both members younger than 30 and members older than 40?
structured: SELECT address FROM member WHERE age  <  30 INTERSECT SELECT address FROM member WHERE age  >  40
sql: SELECT address FROM member WHERE age  <  30 INTERSECT SELECT address FROM member WHERE age  >  40

text: For each phone, show its names and total number of stocks.
structured: SELECT T2.Name ,  sum(T1.Num_of_stock) FROM phone_market AS T1 JOIN phone AS T2 ON T1.Phone_ID  =  T2.Phone_ID GROUP BY T2.Name
sql: SELECT T2.Name ,  sum(T1.Num_of_stock) FROM phone_market AS T1 JOIN phone AS T2 ON T1.Phone_ID  =  T2.Phone_ID GROUP BY T2.Name

text: Count the number of times the team "Boston Red Stockings" lost in 2009 postseason.
structured: SELECT count(*) FROM postseason AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id_loser  =  T2.team_id_br WHERE T2.name  =  'Boston Red Stockings' AND T1.year = 2009;
sql: SELECT count(*) FROM postseason AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id_loser  =  T2.team_id_br WHERE T2.name  =  'Boston Red Stockings' AND T1.year = 2009;

text: Count the number of games taken place in park "Columbia Park" in 1907.
structured: SELECT count(*) FROM home_game AS T1 JOIN park AS T2 ON T1.park_id  =  T2.park_id WHERE T1.year = 1907 AND T2.park_name = 'Columbia Park';
sql: SELECT count(*) FROM home_game AS T1 JOIN park AS T2 ON T1.park_id  =  T2.park_id WHERE T1.year = 1907 AND T2.park_name = 'Columbia Park';

text: Find the name of the customer that has been involved in the most policies.
structured: SELECT t2.customer_details FROM policies AS t1 JOIN customers AS t2 ON t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id GROUP BY t2.customer_details ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1
sql: SELECT t2.customer_details FROM policies AS t1 JOIN customers AS t2 ON t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id GROUP BY t2.customer_details ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

text: What are the names of the states where at least 3 heads were born?
structured: SELECT born_state FROM head GROUP BY born_state HAVING count(*)  >=  3
sql: SELECT born_state FROM head GROUP BY born_state HAVING count(*)  >=  3

text: What is the total number of games played?
structured: SELECT sum(gamesplayed) FROM Sportsinfo
sql: SELECT sum(gamesplayed) FROM Sportsinfo
